playbook.intent: Posting -> sourcing -> structured interview -> offer -> 30/60-day onboarding tuned for in-house product context (not agency client engagement). Output: new hire shipping their first owned feature by day 45
playbook.scope: Posting -> sourcing -> structured interview -> offer -> 30/60-day onboarding tuned for in-house product context (not agency client engagement). Output: new hire shipping their first owned feature by day 45

success-criteria.criterion: All 4 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Hire Right
stage.intent: 60 days starts at offer, not start date.

tasks.task: Run the hiring loop to a calibrated yes/no
Sign offer with start date and first-30 plan attached
Pre-stage access and dev env before day 1

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when day-1 access and plan are pre-staged.

stage.name: Days 1-15 — Land

tasks.task: Day 1-3: intros, comms norms, mission, dev env
Day 4-10: pair on one real piece of work, ship first PR
Day 11-15: own first small ticket end-to-end

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when first ticket has shipped to prod.

stage.name: Days 16-45 — Expand
stage.intent: Own scope; meet most of the surface area.

tasks.task: Take on 3-4 tickets of growing complexity
Embed in standups, retros, and reviews

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when initiative ships and feedback signal is positive.

stage.name: Days 46-60 — Productive
stage.intent: On the bar; review and commit.

tasks.task: Run the 60-day check with manager + peer feedback
Score against the role rubric on day 60
Decide: keep on bar / extend ramp / part ways

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a written 60-day decision in HR records.
